japanese of example sentence_2: データ分析はビジネス戦略を改善できる。
example sentence_3: We need to reduce energy consumption.
japanese of example sentence_3: 私たちはエネルギー消費を減らす必要がある。
example sentence_4: Urban living can be very convenient.
japanese of example sentence_4: 都市生活は非常に便利なことがある。
example sentence_5: The streetlights turn on automatically.
japanese of example sentence_5: 街灯は自動的に点灯する。
example sentence_6: The new engine is very fuel-efficient.
japanese of example sentence_6: 新しいエンジンは非常に燃費が良い。
article: Smart cities use IoT sensors and data analytics to manage traffic, reduce energy consumption, and improve public safety. For example, streetlights that only turn on when someone is nearby can save a lot of electricity. The goal is to make urban living more efficient and sustainable.
